_doc: STQ-02 category (1) — routine single-reading capture. Inspector says 'Circuit three Zs nought point three five.' Both paths converge on circuits[3].measured_zs_ohm = '0.35'. The legacy fixture ships as a single record_extraction tool_use whose input matches the pre-Phase-4 extractFromUtterance result shape; the tool-call fixture ships as a single record_reading tool_use followed by end_turn. After normaliseExtractionResult both reduce to the same {readings:[{circuit:3,field:'measured_zs_ohm',value:'0.35'}]} canonical shape — 0% divergence. Field name uses the canonical enum from config/field_schema.json circuit_fields (Plan 04-07 r1 audit fix — strict:true tool schemas reject `zs` aliases).
_requirement: STT-11 golden-session subset entry. Phase 4 SC #6 gate — ≤10% divergence on the 5-fixture deterministic baseline.

pre_turn_state._doc: Circuit 3 is pre-registered on the board — required because validateRecordReading rejects record_reading on an unknown circuit_ref (see stage6-dispatch-validation.js validateRecordReading).

transcript: Circuit three, Zs nought point three five.

sse_events_legacy._comment: Single-shot record_extraction tool_use — pre-Phase-4 legacy result shape. Input is the full {extracted_readings, questions_for_user, ...} JSON object that extractFromUtterance would have returned.

sse_events_tool_call._comment: Round 1 — model emits a single record_reading tool_use matching the transcript.

sse_events_tool_call_round2._comment: Round 2 — end_turn after the tool_result for round 1 is appended.
